title: Introducing 3 new SDK methods

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to announce 3 new get, set, and listen SDK methods that can help improve routing and navigation within your app!

  1. monday.listen("location"): used to listen to a URL location inside an app
  2. monday.get("location"): used to get a URL location inside an app
  3. monday.set("location"): used to set query params in an app’s URL

Let’s say your board view app has three different pages. You can store the current page’s location in the URL using monday.set("location"). Now when a user bookmarks that page and reenters later, you can route them back to the same page as before. Please note that you can only use this for routing inside your app!
